jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Neuland Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Neuland Laboratories in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Neuland Laboratories:
Neuland Laboratories is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Neuland Laboratories!
